title: redeeming, molten portuguese lamb wrap
description: a comforting, keto-friendly, savory dish featuring juniper berries and tempering chocolate, all wrapped in a pandan leaf.
instructions: season the lamb shoulder with salt and black pepper.
heat ghee in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
remove the lamb from the pot and set it aside.
reduce heat to medium and add chopped onion and minced garlic to the pot.
cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
add juniper berries, red wine, and beef broth to the pot.
return the lamb shoulder to the pot and bring to a boil.
cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
braise the lamb for 2-1/2 hours, or until tender and easily shredded.
remove the lamb from the pot and shred it with two forks.
melt the tempering chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments.
stir the melted chocolate with the shredded lamb until well combined.
wrap the lamb mixture in large pandan leaves and serve immediately.
garnish with chopped cilantro and serve with a side of rice or vegetables, if desired.
